s-1.ptxt: INSPECT WINDSHIELD WASHER MOTOR AND PUMP ASSEMBLY

atten4.ptxt: This check should be performed with the front washer motor and pump installed to the washer jar.

s2.ptxt: Fill the washer jar with washer fluid.
Connect the positive (+) battery lead to terminal A37-1 of the washer motor and pump, and the negative (-) lead to terminal A37-2.
Check if washer fluid is pumped from the washer jar.

specitem.ptxt: Washer fluid is pumped from the washer jar.

atten4.ptxt: The following check should be performed with the windshield washer motor and pump installed to the washer jar.

s2.ptxt: Fill the washer jar with washer fluid.
Disconnect the connector from the washer fluid level sensor.
Measure the resistance according to the value(s) in the table below.
